tasks.check: deno fmt --check && deno lint && deno check apps/api/src/main.ts apps/mock-oidc/src/main.ts apps/mock-oidc/src/provider.ts apps/worker/src/main.ts apps/web/src/main.tsx packages/contracts/mod.ts packages/database/mod.ts packages/observability/mod.ts
tasks.test: deno test --unstable-worker-options apps/api apps/mock-oidc apps/worker packages/contracts packages/database --allow-env --allow-net --allow-read --allow-write --allow-run
